title: Approve release v0.11.0 + confirm v0.10.0/v0.11.0 merge order
description: Release PR #4 (release/v0.11.0) stages the version bump (0.9.0→0.11.0) and changelog for the merged roundToCents feature (PR #3). The annotated git tag / GitHub Release is held pending your approval. Two coupled decisions: (1) approve publishing v0.11.0; (2) confirm the merge sequence — recommended to merge PR #2 (v0.10.0, Metered AI Advisor) before PR #4, otherwise package.json will conflict.
